params.name: Earthworm Codex
params.description: This codex is the culmination of earthworm's wisdom. In the ancient past, they ruled the underground by developing extraordinary technology and creating a magnificent civilization. However, all this came to a halt with the arrival of the dung beetles. This ancient codex became the only vestige of earthworm's existence...
params.ss1:
Fungus Farm: +2%chance to produce
Wonder Fungi
With Earthworm Assistance, ATK +2%
